name: Turkey Picatta
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the pounded turkey cutlets in egg white.
2. Coat each cutlet with bread crumbs.
3. Heat a non-stick pan sprayed with non-stick spray over medium heat.
4. Brown the cutlets, 2 at a time, until golden brown on both sides.
5. Add crushed garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. After all the cutlets are browned, add lemon juice and scrape any brown bits off the pan's bottom.
7. Pour in chicken stock and margarine.
8. Cover the pan and simmer for about 20 minutes or until the cutlets are tender when pierced with a fork.
